---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible issue
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
# Exact command that produces the issue
tit dns --target example.com --output json
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full output or error message.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 14]
- Rust version: [output of `rustc --version`]
- toolkit version: [output of `tit --version`]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
